title: Cloud Application Architecture Patterns & Security
description: A flowchart illustrating common cloud application architecture patterns and their inherent security considerations and components.
relationships: Client requests pass through Load Balancer for distribution
API Gateway routes requests and enforces security policies
Web Tier communicates with Application Tier for processing
Application Tier reads/writes to Database Tier and Cloud Storage
IAM authenticates and authorizes all access requests
All components send logs to Security Monitoring system
